summary: Iteration 80 - Users & Classes Management Edit Functionality and School Settings Page Testing. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend tests passed (100%). The partial field update APIs for students, teachers, and classes are working correctly. No 'Objects are not valid as React child' errors found.

tests: TEST 2: Navigate to Users Management - PASSED
TEST 3: Data Display (42 students, 8 teachers, 8 classes) - PASSED
TEST 4a: Edit Dialog Content (No React error) - PASSED

PUT /api/students/{id} partial update.details: Accepts partial fields (full_name, email, phone, is_active, etc.) and updates only provided fields

PUT /api/teachers/{id} partial update.details: Accepts partial fields (full_name, specialization, phone, is_active, etc.) and updates only provided fields

PUT /api/classes/{id} partial update.details: Accepts partial fields (name, capacity, section, is_active, etc.) and updates only provided fields

No React child error.details: No 'Objects are not valid as React child' errors found in console or page content

School Settings - Teachers from DB.details: Teacher Assignments tab shows 8 teachers fetched from database with emails and specializations

School Settings - Classes from DB.details: Classes tab shows 8 classes fetched from database with names, grades, sections, and capacities

Edit Dialog in Users Management.details: Edit dialog opens correctly with form fields for editing student/teacher/class data

critical_code_review_comments: All partial update APIs (StudentUpdate, TeacherUpdate, ClassUpdate) are correctly implemented with Optional fields
Frontend handleSaveEdit function properly handles error responses to avoid React child errors
School Settings page correctly fetches teachers and classes from /api/teachers and /api/classes endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created test students, teachers, and classes for update testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All partial update APIs for students, teachers, and classes are working correctly. The Users Management page (/principal/users-management) displays 42 students, 8 teachers, and 8 classes with working edit functionality. The School Settings page (/principal/settings) has two main sections: Dynamic Timetable Inputs and Official Static Reference Data. The Dynamic section includes tabs for: العام والفصل الدراسي, أيام العمل, التوقيت والحصص, الاستراحات والصلاة, الفصول والشعب (shows 8 classes from DB), إسناد المعلمين (shows 8 teachers from DB), عدم التوفر, and القيود والتفضيلات. No React child errors were found during testing.
